task_completion.description: Both CSV files are imported and the Region conditional column is created in the employee table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Data pane on the right, both 'sales_data' and 'employee_performance' tables should be visible. Expand 'employee_performance' to verify a field named 'Region' exists.

task_completion.description: A relationship is established between the two tables using the Region column.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Model view (third icon on the left rail), there should be a relationship line connecting the 'sales_data' and 'employee_performance' tables.

task_completion.description: A DAX measure named Sales_Per_Head is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Data pane, there should be a field named 'Sales_Per_Head' with a calculator icon next to it, indicating it is a measure.

task_completion.description: The report page is named 'Integrated View'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At the bottom of the report canvas, the active page tab should be renamed to 'Integrated View'.

task_completion.description: A Scatter Chart is created showing average Salary versus total Sales_Amount by Region.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the report canvas, there should be a Scatter Chart visual. The axes should represent Salary and Sales_Amount, and the data points (bubbles) should represent the different Regions.

task_completion.description: A Matrix visual is created showing Region as rows with Sales_Amount and average Performance Score as values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the report canvas, there should be a Matrix visual. The rows should list the Regions, and the columns/values should display Sales_Amount and Performance Score.

task_completion.description: The Power BI report is saved as Integrated_Analysis.pbix.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar at the top of the Power BI Desktop window should read 'Integrated_Analysis - Power BI Desktop'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Power BI Desktop GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Power BI Desktop application open with menus, panes, and dialogs being actively used, rather than just a terminal or script editor.

integrity.description: The visuals on the report canvas are genuinely rendered by Power BI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Scatter Chart and Matrix should appear as native Power BI visuals with standard formatting, tooltips, and selection handles when active, not pasted images.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected answers or DAX formulas into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: DAX formulas and column names should be entered in the Power BI formula bar or Power Query Editor, not in Notepad or another text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires importing 'sales_data' and 'employee_performance' tables. A conditional column 'Region' must be created in the employee table. A relationship must be established between the tables on the 'Region' column. A DAX measure named 'Sales_Per_Head' must be created with the formula: DIVIDE(SUM(sales_data[Sales_Amount]), COUNTROWS(employee_performance), 0). The report page must be named 'Integrated View' and contain a Scatter Chart (Salary vs Sales_Amount by Region) and a Matrix visual (Region rows, Sales_Amount and Performance Score values). The file must be saved as 'Integrated_Analysis.pbix'.
